name: Math4TopDogs
short_description: Master the art of reflexes and mental math in a real action-adventure game. Explore magical worlds and uncover all their secrets, creatures, and treasures. Take on every challenge and, if you wish, compete in the global ranking. (7-120 years old)
detailed_description:
Playable without an internet connection.
Connection required only if you want to submit your TopDogScore to the global ranking. (Anonymous connection with a nickname, no registration required)

Master the art of reflexes and mental math in worlds with multiple challenges:

  • The 10 magical chest beaches with their infernal coconuts.

Complete the 5 increasing levels to reach the "Sharks" level.

Collect seashells, earn costumes, catch the final diamond, gather the fisherman's fish to fill your aquarium, and stock up on coconut milk.

  • The deserts of the Pollugon people with their enchanting clouds.

Reach the "Legend" level across 6 clouds.

Capture the Pollugon creatures, earn "Quick Shots" points, and meet the enigmatic Algebronco.

  • The fantastic forests with enchanted bubbles and mushrooms.

Explore 10 forests with progressive levels. Face Pollumath in the final mushroom. Earn costumes, fill your treasure chest with gold coins and gems. Attempt "perfect" runs and score "combo" points.

Become the hero or heroine who will restore order in each world.

Sharpen your focus, develop your composure, and become unshakable!

Automatic save feature and a 1v1 local mode on the same device available for even more fun!
